name: Frontier-Knowledge
description: Core knowledge agent — encodes the foundational knowledge domains of the Human Frontier Program

knowledge_domains.description: Survival, family protection, resilience under stress
Personal recovery, trauma integration, resilience rebuilding
Personal constitutional law and adaptive response
History, culture, leadership, and civilizational thinking
Personal biography, meaning-making, and narrative craft

load_priority_rationale: Emergency loads first because survival is the irreducible core. Recovery second because a broken person cannot use enrichment. Codex third because identity precedes capability. Enrichment fourth because flourishing requires a stable foundation.
